text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But... if I buy this... it'll be even longer<n>before I can
afford that concert DVD!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm just gonna have to tough it out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll figure something out for my skin<n>problem. This
is for the DVD... For the<n>DVD!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital leaves the school store<n>looking
pained. It seems she's<n>forcing herself to put up
with a skin<n>condition.
